note: Workcamp backstory revealed through scrolls, audio logs, and environmental storytelling in rifts. No exposition dumps. The player pieces together the corporate water wars, the breaking of the Underearth, and their own past.

chapters.content_theme: escape_and_bargaining — workcamp release, first taste of freedom and the cost of survival
workcamp_conditions — exploitation, Soul Link implantation, youth sold into labor
corporate_exploitation_of_depths — water wars, breaking open the ancient realm
underneath_awakens_to_threat — dynamic threat, the Underearth pushing back against expansion
true_nature_of_underearth_revealed — cosmic horror, blurred line between man/machine/monster, possible redemption or deeper horror
